@graph.name: TPO Flat Roofing - Capitol Improvements
@graph.description: MuleHide Certified TPO contractor and FORTIFIED certified. Commercial and residential flat roof installation, repair, and replacement. Energy-efficient single-ply membrane systems in Maryland, Virginia, and DC.

itemOffered.name: TPO Flat Roof Installation
itemOffered.description: Thermoplastic polyolefin single-ply membrane roofing — energy reflective and durable.

itemOffered.name: EPDM Flat Roof Installation
itemOffered.description: Ethylene propylene diene monomer rubber roofing for long-lasting flat roof performance.

itemOffered.name: Flat Roof Repair
itemOffered.description: Leak detection, membrane patching, and seam repair for existing flat roof systems.

itemOffered.name: Flat Roof Drain Installation
itemOffered.description: Interior and edge drain systems to prevent pooling water on flat and low-slope roofs.

itemOffered.name: Rooftop Deck over Flat Roof
itemOffered.description: Integrated rooftop deck and waterproofing systems for urban homes and rowhouses.
